tasks.title: Define StableId v1
tasks.summary: Define the immutable ID primitive for content, rooms, runs, events and transactions.
tasks.objective: Implement canonical stable-ID parsing, formatting, namespaces, equality, ordering and rejection rules.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contract: planning identity boundary v1.
outputs: StableId v1 source, tests and contract document
implementation_notes: Forbidden: accepted plans, Packages, ProjectSettings, Scenes, UI, ContentPackages, gameplay implementations and unowned serialized assets. Serialized owner: none. Save impact: ID key only. Registry impact: canonical key. Rollback owned files and rerun tests. Prototype debt: none unless registered and human-approved.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical IDs round-trip and order deterministically.
Invalid, ambiguous, traversal and duplicate forms fail; UnityEngine is absent.
verification: Automated: parse, format, equality, ordering and invalid-form tests.
Manual/playable: review use across content, rooms, events, saves and registries.
tasks.handoff_notes: Consumers use StableId v1; no duplicate ID contract.

tasks.title: Define ContentVersion and BuildIdentity v1
tasks.summary: Define immutable fingerprints for content, source, editor, packages, save schema and formal artifacts.
tasks.objective: Provide deterministic identity values without implementing the build pipeline.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contracts: StableId v1; pinned editor and package lock.
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized owner: none. Save impact: schema identity field only. Registry impact: content fingerprint. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: All accepted identity fields exist and serialize deterministically.
Malformed formal identity fails instead of using placeholders.
verification: Automated: equality, field-order, missing-field and fingerprint-change tests.
Manual/playable: confirm formal build identity works fully offline.
tasks.handoff_notes: Evidence and registry tasks consume Identity v1.

tasks.title: Define player intent contracts v1
tasks.summary: Define device-independent move, aim, fire, power, thruster, interaction, map, pause and UI intents.
tasks.objective: Keep device checks out of gameplay and allow one fire/power intent to drive four mounts.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contracts: StableId v1; accepted input boundary.
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized owner: none. Save and registry impact: none. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: Move and aim are independent normalized intents.
No keyboard, mouse, gamepad or touch identifiers enter gameplay contracts.
verification: Automated: normalization, simultaneous-action and held/pressed/released tests.
Manual/playable: map keyboard/mouse and gamepad to the same intent records.
tasks.handoff_notes: Movement, combat and evidence harness consume Player Intents v1.

tasks.title: Define common combat messages v1
tasks.summary: Define immutable damage, hit, vital, contact, weight and status messages shared by combat lanes.
tasks.objective: Prevent each consumer from inventing its own combat DTOs or mutable universal combat object.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contract: StableId v1; accepted combat boundary.
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized, save and registry impact: none. No randomized modifiers. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: Messages are immutable, Unity-free and identify source, target, channel and result.
Negative or ambiguous health/shield state fails validation.
verification: Automated: shield overflow, duplicate event, contact class, invalid-value and unknown-channel tests.
Manual/playable: confirm movement, weapons, enemies, HUD and diagnostics can share the messages.
tasks.handoff_notes: All combat producers and consumers use Combat Messages v1.

tasks.title: Define four-mount weapon and HUD contracts v1
tasks.summary: Represent four independently operating weapon mounts under one aim and fire intent.
tasks.objective: Define slots, readiness, cadence, heat or charge, recoil, power bank, fire result and HUD ordering.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contracts: Player Intents v1; Combat Messages v1.
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized, save and registry impact: none. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: Exactly four stable independent slots are represented; normal fire is unlimited.
An empty power bank falls back per mount while other mounts remain empowered.
verification: Automated: slot uniqueness, mixed readiness, mixed power fallback and HUD ordering tests.
Manual/playable: walk all five amended Stage 1 weapon archetypes through the contract.
tasks.handoff_notes: Combat and HUD implementations consume Four-Mount Weapons v1.

tasks.title: Define mission command and event envelopes v1
tasks.summary: Define validated command, event, sequence, payload-version and rejection envelopes.
tasks.objective: Create the state-transition boundary without implementing MissionRunState, snapshots or journals.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contracts: StableId v1; Identity v1.
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized owner: none. Save impact: sequence and version fields only. Registry impact: none. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: Commands carry command ID, run ID, payload version and expected sequence; events and rejections are typed.
No scene references or implication that ordinary gameplay ticks are journaled.
verification: Automated: duplicate, stale/future sequence, version, order and rejection tests.
Manual/playable: trace room-clear, checkpoint, banking and completion requests without deciding domain state.
tasks.handoff_notes: Room, encounter, diagnostics and Stage 2 state tasks consume Mission Messages v1.

tasks.title: Define room lifecycle and projection contracts v1
tasks.summary: Define how additive rooms request state, present it, submit commands and unload without durable authority.
tasks.objective: Specify room identity, sockets, projection keys, services and idempotent lifecycle transitions.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized, save and registry impact: none. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: Room identity, sockets, keys, services and lifecycle are explicit and idempotent.
Projection interfaces cannot mutate permanent clear, reward, route, checkpoint or objective truth.
verification: Automated: lifecycle, repeated refresh, reload, unknown-key and connection tests.
Manual/playable: confirm arena, short route and later factory can share the contract while MissionRunState remains authoritative.
tasks.handoff_notes: Arena, encounters and Stage 2 room projections consume Room Projection v1.

tasks.title: Define encounter lifecycle contracts v1
tasks.summary: Define deterministic encounter start, reinforcement, retreat, lockdown, withdrawal, completion and budget messages.
tasks.objective: Create the boundary among loaded encounter runtime, rooms, enemies, mission events and verification tooling.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contracts: Combat v1; Mission v1; Room Projection v1.
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized, save and registry impact: none. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: Entries, reinforcements, retreat, lockdown, completion and performance budgets are explicit.
Loaded combat may be runtime-local, but durable completion is a mission event.
verification: Automated: repeat-start, reinforcement-order, retreat, lockdown, completion-once and budget tests.
Manual/playable: map three ordinary roles, Foreman Elite and route encounters without special envelopes.
tasks.handoff_notes: Enemy and encounter builders consume Encounter Lifecycle v1.

tasks.title: Define typed content references v1
tasks.summary: Define stable references, descriptors, kinds, versions and structured validation results for content.
tasks.objective: Keep ScriptableObject identity and mutable runtime state out of shared engine-independent contracts.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contracts: StableId v1; Identity v1; accepted content plan.
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized and save impact: none. Registry impact: defines registry input semantics. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: References use StableId plus expected definition kind and version.
Duplicate, missing, wrong-kind, unsupported, cyclic and provenance errors are distinct; no mutable runtime state is stored.
verification: Automated: resolution, cycle, duplicate and deterministic error-order tests.
Manual/playable: map every accepted definition kind while keeping ScriptableObjects as adapters.
tasks.handoff_notes: Weapons, enemies, rooms and art pipeline consume Content Definitions v1.

tasks.title: Define generated registry formats v1
tasks.summary: Define canonical machine registry and deterministic human review-snapshot formats.
tasks.objective: Specify canonical ordering, schema version, fingerprints, validation summary and diff-friendly output.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contracts: Identity v1; Content Definitions v1.
outputs: Generated Registry schemas v1 and tests
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized owner: two generated text schema files only. Save impact: none. Registry impact: schema and canonical-order owner. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: Entries order canonically by kind and StableId with explicit schema and fingerprints.
Output is deterministic, diff-friendly, free of runtime state and machine-local paths.
verification: Automated: schema validation and shuffled-input byte-stability tests.
Manual/playable: compare independently generated fixtures for byte identity.
tasks.handoff_notes: CS-011 is the sole generator owner for Registry v1.

tasks.title: Implement registry generation and drift validation
tasks.summary: Create the sole deterministic generator and validator for central registries and review snapshots.
tasks.objective: Scan approved descriptors, validate references, write atomically and fail on drift or manual edits.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contracts: Generated Registry v1; UF-005 ownership map.
outputs: baseline generated registry and review snapshot
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized owner: generated text outputs only. Save impact: none. Registry impact: exclusive central-output owner; regenerate only. Rollback tool and outputs together. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: One command atomically regenerates both outputs.
Duplicate, missing, wrong-kind, version, order and manual-edit drift fail deterministically.
verification: Automated: generate twice from shuffled fixtures, compare checksums, hand-edit output and confirm failure.
Manual/playable: confirm later content tasks contribute inputs and never edit central outputs.
tasks.handoff_notes: All generated registries must pass through this tool; never hand-merge output.

tasks.title: Define diagnostics and run-validity contracts v1
tasks.summary: Define bounded local diagnostic events, invalidating commands, performance warnings and evidence validity.
tasks.objective: Create privacy-safe diagnostic, validity and support-bundle manifests tied to BuildIdentity.
tasks.context: Milestone S1.0; frozen question: establish stable engine-independent contracts for safe parallel work.
inputs: Consumed contracts: Identity v1; Mission Messages v1; accepted evidence rules.
implementation_notes: Forbidden paths as CS-001. Serialized owner: none. Save impact: identity and recovery event fields only. Registry impact: none. Rollback owned files. Prototype debt: none.
acceptance_criteria: Required Stage 1 technical events and identities are representable.
Technical invalidity is separate from fun evidence; support export is local, bounded, explicit and private.
verification: Automated: order, bounds, redaction, version and validity-accumulation tests.
Manual/playable: map all Stage 1 gate data without remote telemetry.
tasks.handoff_notes: Evidence harness and reliability tasks consume Diagnostics v1.
